code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import axios from'axios';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Menu(_ref){let{user}=_ref;const[menuItems,setMenuItems]=useState([]);const[cart,setCart]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{axios.get('/api/menu').then(res=>{console.log('Menu items:',res.data);setMenuItems(res.data);}).catch(err=>console.error('Error fetching menu:',err));const savedCart=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('cart'))||[];setCart(savedCart);},[]);const addToCart=item=>{const newCart=[...cart,item];setCart(newCart);localStorage.setItem('cart',JSON.stringify(newCart));alert("".concat(item.name," added to cart!"));};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"menu-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Our Menu"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Fresh & Delicious South Indian Food"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"menu-grid",children:menuItems&&menuItems.length>0?menuItems.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"menu-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:item.image||'https://via.placeholder.com/200',alt:item.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:item.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"price",children:["\u20B9",item.price]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>addToCart(item),children:"Add to Cart"})]},item.id)):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Loading menu..."})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{textAlign:'center',marginTop:'30px'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:"/cart",style:{padding:'12px 30px',background:'linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b35 0%, #f7931e 100%)',color:'white',textDecoration:'none',borderRadius:'8px',fontWeight:'600',display:'inline-block'},children:["View Cart (",cart.length,")"]})})]});}export default Menu;
